" -- " [STEAK POV]

Reckless, just like him

You and Steak, siblings, hooray!! Although for a fact you both were 5 years apart, you both weren't any different from each other, always causing chaos and shi like that. But you know for a fact hes still loves you no matter what. Right now, you got a little.. too far, and ended getting injured. But he decided to laugh it off, knowing you were still just you.

✧─── ・ 。゚★: .✦ . :★. ───✧
